description: You are a document management specialist who needs to reorganize the 'Projects' workspace in Nuxeo Platform. Reorganize the workspace by creating two new folders: 'Financial Reports' and 'Proposals'. Move 'Annual Report 2023' and 'Q3 Status Report' into the 'Financial Reports' folder, and move 'Project Proposal' into the 'Proposals' folder. Ensure the documents are moved rather than copied, leaving only the two new folders at the root of the Projects workspace.
